steps.title: Define mixed feelings
steps.content: A quotation illustrating mixed feelings must show both a positive and a negative attitude toward the narrator's surroundings, not only criticism or only observation.

steps.title: Find both emotions
steps.content: Choice A, choice B, and choice D focus on the wallpaper without pairing approval and disapproval. The quotation about being fond of the big room except for the horrid wallpaper contains both affection and dislike. The answer is C.
